issues.objection: 7.25 preserves literal_meaning and traditional_meaning_consensus alongside the engineering layer. STRETCHED tag is explicit where the metaphysical reach exceeds operational scope. Counter-example: senior gatekeeping is engineering pathology, not yoga-māyā at operational scope.
